title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MASBATE NORTH ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MASBATE, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO AMANCIO AGUILAR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16906 / 65 OG No. 26, 6578 (June 30, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5395, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MASBATE NORTH ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MASBATE, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO AMANCIO AGUILAR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Masbate North Elementary School in the Municipality of Masbate, Province of Masbate, is hereby changed to Amancio Aguilar Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
